scenes.headline: Who watches your portfolio?
scenes.sub: Most investors are on their own. You don't have to be.
scenes.voiceover: What if a personal wealth advisor watched your portfolio around the clock?

scenes.headline: Meet Corvexsa
scenes.voiceover: Meet Corvexsa — your personal AI investment advisor.

scenes.headline: Read-only. Always.
scenes.sub: Never holds funds. Never executes trades. Only advises.
scenes.voiceover: Connect your broker in seconds. Read-only, always — Corvexsa never touches your money.

scenes.headline: A deep review, daily
scenes.sub: Clear buy, hold, or trim calls — with the reasoning behind them
scenes.voiceover: Every twenty-four hours, a deep review: clear buy, hold, or trim calls, with exact quantities and the reasoning.

scenes.headline: Vigilance, delivered
scenes.voiceover: It scans the market, and alerts your phone the moment something material changes.

scenes.headline: One conversation
scenes.sub: An advisor that remembers you, your goals, your preferences
scenes.voiceover: No dashboards. Just one conversation, with an advisor who remembers you.

scenes.headline: Corvexsa
scenes.sub: Smarter investing starts with a conversation.
scenes.voiceover: Smarter investing starts with a conversation. Start yours at Corvexsa dot com.
scenes.disclaimer: Corvexsa provides analysis only. It never executes trades or holds funds. Investing involves risk, including possible loss of principal. Not financial advice.
